name: Global Inventory & Stock
purpose: Stock control, receiving, and governance across physical/logical sites.

navigation.label: Stock Controller
navigation.purpose: Identify stock-outs, anomalies, and expiry risks.

navigation.label: Receiving Dock
navigation.purpose: Formally accept incoming shipments into the system.

navigation.label: Adjustment Desk
navigation.purpose: Fix stock discrepancies and log damaged/lost items.
